prompt: Create a luminous fantasy anime illustration of a tender spiritual encounter between a radiant angel and a kneeling nun in a blooming celestial garden. The angel is a young feminine figure with very long flowing golden blonde hair streaming across the scene, wearing a translucent white robe with delicate gold embroidery and a jeweled golden neckline, with two enormous feathered wings spread behind her. A brilliant sunlike halo and backlight glow directly above and behind the angel’s head, scattering gold sparks and blue-white light through the feathers. The angel gently places one hand on the nun’s bowed head in blessing while the nun clasps both hands in prayer. The nun wears a deep navy blue veil and traditional habit with a white wimple, kneeling humbly and looking upward. Surround them with a dense dreamlike field of blue, violet, lavender, and peach flowers, drifting petals, glittering dust, and swirling strands of light. Composition is vertical portrait, close and intimate, with the angel occupying the upper left and center, the nun in the lower right, their hands forming the emotional focal point. Style: highly detailed painterly anime fantasy art, ethereal Catholic-inspired iconography, soft luminous brushwork, iridescent wings, dramatic rim lighting, warm gold highlights contrasted with cool blues and purples, romantic sacred atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
